chapter_title: About the Obligation of Invoking Allah

hadith_entries.text:
762. Narrated by Sa'eed ibn Abu-Sa'eed Al-Maqbori: 'The
Messenger of Allah said: "He, in whose presence I was
mentioned but he did not invoke Allah to shower of His
mercy on me, has exposed himself to loss. He who was
granted life until he attends the month of Ramadhan without
attaining forgiveness, has exposed himself to loss. He, who
was given life and lived with his parents and was not forgiven
due to their invocations, has exposed himself to loss." The
sub-narrator said that he was in doubt as to whether the
Prophet had said: 'his parents or one of his parents."

763. Narrated Ali ibn Abu-Taleb: 'The Messenger of
Allah said: "The miserly person is he, in whose presence I
was mentioned, but he did not invoke Allah to shower of
His mercy on me."
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
764. Amr ibn Malek Al-Janbiy said that he had heard
Fadhala ibn Obayd saying: 'The Prophet heard a man
invoking Allah without asking Allah to shower of His
mercy on the Prophet .The Prophet said: "This person
has hurried up (in his invocation)." The Prophet summoned
that man and said to him or to another person: "If one of you
invokes Allah, let him start with praising Allah the due
praise and invoke Him to shower of His mercy on the Prophet
,then to invoke whatever he likes."

765. Narrated Ka'ab ibn Ojra: "We said: "O Messenger of
Allah! We have been taught to invoke Salam (peace) for you,
how would we invoke Salat (invocation) for you? He said:
"Say: O Allah! Send down prayers on Muhammad and the
household of Muhammad as You had sent prayers on
Ibraheem and the household of Ibraheem. You are Glorious
and Praiseworthy. And send down blessings on Muhammad
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
and the household of Muhammad as You had sent down
blessings on Ibraheem and the household of Ibraheem. You
are Glorious and Praiseworthy."""

766. Narrated Abdullah ibn Mas'oud" "The Messenger of Allah
said: "The worthiest people of me on the Day of Judgment are
those who invoke the mercy of Allah for me much."
Book of remembering Allah
